task5_stale_dict.mechanism: schema.md predates row-grain migration (order->item); sku column absent from schema is the meta-tell; order_id duplicates are the data tell
task5_stale_dict.trap_answer: AOV ~$28.67, top channel web (doc-trusting row mean)

task6_units.mechanism: processor_b amounts are integer cents (undocumented); tells are all-integer amounts and ~100x per-txn scale vs processor_a

task7_join.mechanism: 9% of succeeded payments re-posted (new payment_id, same order/amount); row-sum double counts; orders.order_total enables reconciliation

task8_versions.mechanism: lexicographic sort ranks 2.9.3 above 2.10.1; event_date corroborates true release order
